title: Ego's Shenanigans
description: The starter pack to be a bounty hunter.
body:
![Ego](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa89474fcaf31750e673195cf9f1164a15779c86.png)

# Ever wanted to become a Bounty Hunter on a minecraft server? 

**Well with this mod, you can !**

this mod adds 8 items, the "greed rune", the "Adrenaline Shot", the "Bag of Tricks", the "EMP", the "Marksman's Proof", the "Portable Stasis Chamber", "the Husk of all trades" and the "tracker" 

- **The Greed Rune** allows you to become a LOT stealthier when you walk around and spy on someone, when held in your inventory, it will make you emit not sound when walking, and a bunch of other effects.

- **The Adrenaline Shot** makes you faster, hit harder and also allow you to become invulnerable for a few seconds, no knockback, no damage, nothing, until it wears off and you get every damage you took in the time all at once.

- **The Bag of Tricks** is a bundle-like item which you can fill with different items for different result. Fill it with a sand block, and when right click, you'll throw sand at your opponent's eyes to blind them. Fill it with soul sand and it'll stun, with an enderpearl, it'll teleport your opponent away and with blaze powder it'll set them ablaze.

- **E.M.P** An upgrade to the **Portable Stasis Chamber**, changing the chamber to create an enchantment disurption shockwave when right clicked, which will get rid of every echantments in a 30 blocks radius for 30 seconds.

- **Marksman's Proof** a simple enough item, when carried in the inventory, every player you kill will drop their head.

- **Portable Stasis Chamber** is filled with 2 enderpearls and then bound to a lodstone, when you bind it, you force load the chunk until your right click the stasis to teleport to it. When teleported, your enderpearls will be consumed, and the stasis unbound.

- **The Husk of all trades** is a basic sword with iron tier stats, by itself, it's not good, but if you sneak right click to build up charges (by using your max health as ammo), you can then right click with different items on the sword in your inventory to unlock cool abilities. I won't spoil the abilities, but the items are: Soul Sand, Ender Pearl, Spider Eye and Ghast Tear. _You can also enchant the sword with either **"Blood Offering"** to sacrifice a charge slot for more damage and less speed OR with **"Metamorphosis"** which allows you (when you're below 4hp) to right click the sword and turn into mist with the ability to fly to escape the fight._

- **The Tracker** is a bit more complicated so I'll make it short, once you right click a player, the tracker is bound to it, you can find them wherever they are, until you sneak and right click to clear the tracker.


**_be on the lookout for more updates, and remember, if you're killing someone, at least, get paid for it._**


"The Pale Riseth" music disc by my friend [D-man](https://modrinth.com/user/D-man_Hartey)
